title: This is the Life
content:
content Amy Macdonald is a Scottish singer-songwriter known for her warm voice and honest songwriting, blending folk, rock, and pop into a distinctive style.

Released in 2007, 'This Is the Life' became her breakthrough hit across Europe. Inspired by youthful nights out with friends, the song captures a feeling of freedom, optimism, and unforgettable moments, making it one of her most iconic tracks.

title: Common People
content:
Pulp are an English alternative rock and Britpop band from Sheffield, best known for their sharp lyrics, stylish sound, and Jarvis Cocker’s distinctive voice and storytelling.

Common People is their most iconic song, released in 1995. It tells the story of class, identity, and pretending to live like ordinary people, wrapped in a catchy, energetic Britpop anthem. The song became one of the defining tracks of the 1990s British music scene.
